final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" (Fairy Sister).

Style/medium: needs a livestream UI aesthetic — references in the spirit of Douyin/TikTok interface design language, Chinese influencer livestream visual culture, 2020s mobile streaming app interfaces; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical frame with livestream interface elements (comments, likes, gift buttons visible)
Subject: must include "神仙姐姐" as the streamer, holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must be a livestream room setting with typical Douyin UI overlay
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant livestream direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio, livestream UI elements visible, sign clearly readable
Avoid:
